name: 埃丝特·奥梅巴
name_full: 埃丝特·奥梅巴 Esther Omegba
introduction: Born in Lagos, Nigeria, Esther Omegba is a university-trained, Nigerian-American actress who will be making her television debut with a recurring role on J.J. Abram's upcoming HBO MAX TV show, "Duster". She has starred in a plethora of local and national commercials, short films, and theater productions. She graduated with distinction from the University of Colorado Boulder with a major in Political Science and a minor in Theater. As soon as she graduated, she began her professional acting journey and has been blessed to find success so early. Esther loves storytelling and believes that acting is the foremost way to portray the human condition.
